title: Request design assurance for an active travel scheme
body: "Active Travel England (ATE) offers design assurance for any government-funded  active travel or cross-modal scheme.  You can use this form to apply for ATE to review your scheme.  Eligibility  This service is available for:   any government-funded travel project in England local authorities in Scotland, Northern Ireland or Wales that have received support from the Levelling Up Fund    What you will need to apply  To apply for an ATE active travel review for your scheme, you will need to:   supply the design stage gate of your project attach a plan showing the extent of the scheme plan and supporting information provide contact details for 2 people associated with the scheme – if you are a local authority that is part of a combined authority (CA), the second contact must be a CA contact provide a funding programme scheme reference number – your ATE regional manager can provide this if you don’t have one   Apply for ATE design assurance  Apply for ATE design assurance   Guidance and support  You can read guidance about how Active Travel England works with local authorities and partners to provide design assurance for active travel schemes.  If you have any questions, you can contact contact@activetravelengland.gov.uk.  "
